analysis: The project currently has a basic HTML structure with some CSS and JavaScript files. The theme is not yet focused on black holes or cosmic elements. The existing to-dos indicate that the CSS and HTML files need to be completed to include a dark, cosmic theme with animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The JavaScript file needs to be updated with functionality for interactive elements related to black holes.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Add CSS animations for black hole formation, event horizon effects, and gravitational lensing.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices. Include sections for black hole information, interactive planets, and animated slides.

Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add functionality for interactive elements related to black holes, such as clickable planets and animated slides.
